name: Internet Trust QA and Copy Guardrail Pass
controlling_principle: CyberShield does not ask whether we trust a person. It asks which claims, artifacts, evidence paths, and reliance decisions can be trusted, at what confidence, for what purpose, and with what risk if wrong.
boundary: Static advisory prototype QA pass only. No live extraction, live verification, live evidence retrieval, live URL ingestion, live scoring, political validation, legal determination, report delivery, ticketing, notifications, or workflow automation is performed.
purpose: Harden Internet Trust labels, boundary language, prohibited-branding checks, overclaim controls, and GitHub Pages QA notes before moving beyond V59.
overclaim_guardrails: Do not claim live URL ingestion
Do not claim live internet retrieval
Do not claim live evidence retrieval
Do not claim live claim extraction
Do not claim legal or compliance determinations
Do not claim CMMC certification or healthcare compliance validation
Do not claim report delivery, ticketing, notifications, or workflow automation
Do not label people or sources as trusted/untrusted

label_guardrails.required_copy: Static advisory prototype. Evidence states show what must be verified before reliance.
Prototype proof output. Validate evidence before board, customer, legal, financial, public, or policy reliance.
Scenario-family scaffold. No live internet retrieval or automated verification.
V59.5 guardrails active. GitHub Pages browser QA required after deploy.

github_pages_qa_required: Open Evidence and confirm Internet Trust scaffold, artifact intake, claim table, claim trace, export contract, and board narrative appear
Open Proof Pack and confirm Internet Trust Board Narrative and Proof Pack Export Contract appear
Open Architecture and confirm Internet Trust scaffold still appears
Confirm no new top-level tab exists
Confirm all modal open/close actions work
Search visible copy for prohibited terms

Confirm no live URL ingestion, internet retrieval, evidence retrieval, claim extraction, scoring, verification, political validation, report delivery, ticketing, notification, workflow, certification, or compliance overclaims appear
Confirm TrustMap still has thick neon-blue CyberShield core perimeter and no black bevel
definition_of_done: Guardrail UI appears in Evidence, Proof Pack, and Settings/Admin context
Allowed and prohibited terms are visible for builders
QA checklist is visible and downloadable
README, bots.txt, governance-summary.json, and loader are updated
